falsification_rules: independent holdout shows no compaction or wrong operator regions
holdout shows condition-independent stable globular dominance
holdout shows a complete stable globular or assembly-required fold without persistent disorder boundary
holdout shows open beta sheet, wrong beta subtype, or protected membrane/assembly/metal/disorder context
holdout shows independent single-domain closure, solved prior membrane/assembly/metal/disorder/beta context, or no interdomain operator dependence
holdout shows purely local defect with no interface/proteostasis dependence
holdout supports only one state under all contexts
wrong-region perturbations dominate while predicted interface is inert
free-state holdout shows stable standalone fold
holdout shows ligand-independent folding or no geometry-locked basin effect
matched controls beat the real target, or metal/TM/beta/repeat grammar explains the evidence better
matched controls beat the real signal, true-TM insertion dominates, or wrong grammar explains the boundary better
assembly/globular grammar preserves the evidence better, matched heptad controls beat the real target, or register perturbation is inert
beta/multidomain/globular grammar explains the target better, repeat controls beat the real target, or repeat perturbation is inert
globular/beta/repeat grammar explains the target better, topology-masked controls beat the real target, or threading perturbation is inert
holdout shows a complete monomeric fold, true membrane topology, or ligand-stabilized core without assembly dependence
null_controls: generic hydrophobicity alone cannot validate target-specific closure
generic oligomer copy metadata cannot override explicit IDR/low-complexity boundary evidence
beta-rich sequence alone is not topology and must abstain when closure evidence is weak
generic domain text or copy-count metadata cannot validate an allosteric architecture without explicit domain-boundary/hinge/swap context
single averaged consensus fold is rejected
generic viral accessory annotation cannot validate the packet
bound-state order cannot be promoted to free-state solved fold
generic ligand annotation alone cannot define full grammar
generic cofactor annotation without metal, heme, nucleotide, or ligand-lock evidence remains generic cofactor
signal peptide text, odd cysteine noise, true TM topology, or Cys-His metal coordination cannot validate disulfide grammar
multi-pass TM, signal-anchor ambiguity, secretory disulfide, coiled/repeat/knotted candidates, and membrane sentinels cannot validate signal-peptide grammar
generic oligomer, ordinary helix bundle, or globular hydrophobic core cannot validate coiled-coil register
long multidomain text, beta closure, or generic repeat words without phase/axis support cannot validate solenoid grammar
sequence alone cannot validate knotted topology; explicit non-coordinate topology context is required
generic complex annotation alone cannot validate assembly-required folding
perturbation_prediction_rules: correct perturbations move the named state variable in the predicted direction
wrong-region perturbations must remain weaker than correct perturbations
forced wrong grammar must abstain or fail

transition_rules.falsification_rule: independent holdout shows no compaction or wrong operator regions
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: hydrophobic + aromatic + secondary_structure_tendency + solvent + folding_nucleus + closure_operator + frustration_operator -> expanded chain to compact nucleus/contact-enriched ensemble -> core-region perturbation weakens compaction and long-range topology
transition_rules.null_control: generic hydrophobicity alone cannot validate target-specific closure
transition_rules.state_change: expanded chain to compact nucleus/contact-enriched ensemble
transition_rules.testable_effect: core-region perturbation weakens compaction and long-range topology

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows condition-independent stable globular dominance
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: low_complexity + aromatic + charged + glycine/proline-rich + concentration + salt + rna_partner + disorder_operator + phase_operator + repulsion_operator -> expanded disorder to dynamic phase-prone ensemble without single stable fold -> aromatic/charge or condition perturbations shift condensation tendency
transition_rules.state_change: expanded disorder to dynamic phase-prone ensemble without single stable fold
transition_rules.testable_effect: aromatic/charge or condition perturbations shift condensation tendency

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows a complete stable globular or assembly-required fold without persistent disorder boundary
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: IDR_boundary + structured_domain_plus_IDR_tail + fold_upon_binding_region + phase_prone_low_complexity + disorder_with_local_motif + binding_partner + concentration + salt + disorder_operator + interface_operator + phase_operator -> generic oligomer or compact-fold readout to explicit disorder-boundary ensemble with partner-conditioned local order -> boundary, local motif, or partner perturbation changes ordering without promoting a whole-chain solved fold
transition_rules.null_control: generic oligomer copy metadata cannot override explicit IDR/low-complexity boundary evidence
transition_rules.state_change: generic oligomer or compact-fold readout to explicit disorder-boundary ensemble with partner-conditioned local order
transition_rules.testable_effect: boundary, local motif, or partner perturbation changes ordering without promoting a whole-chain solved fold

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows open beta sheet, wrong beta subtype, or protected membrane/assembly/metal/disorder context
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: closed_beta_topology + strand_register + beta_sheet_closure + soluble_beta_barrel + membrane_beta_barrel + beta_propeller_repeat_closure + beta_sandwich_core + jelly_roll_wrap + greek_key_beta_lock + beta_helix_solenoid_stack + alpha_beta_barrel_distinction + solvent + membrane + strand_register + repeat_closure + closure_operator + interface_operator + frustration_operator -> beta propensity to subtype-specific strand-register closure without confusing membrane, propeller, sandwich, solenoid, or alpha/beta barrels -> strand-register or blade/repeat perturbations weaken the selected beta closure while preserving non-beta priority classes
transition_rules.null_control: beta-rich sequence alone is not topology and must abstain when closure evidence is weak
transition_rules.state_change: beta propensity to subtype-specific strand-register closure without confusing membrane, propeller, sandwich, solenoid, or alpha/beta barrels
transition_rules.testable_effect: strand-register or blade/repeat perturbations weaken the selected beta closure while preserving non-beta priority classes

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows independent single-domain closure, solved prior membrane/assembly/metal/disorder/beta context, or no interdomain operator dependence
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: multidomain_allostery + domain_boundary + hinge_region + interdomain_lock + allosteric_basin_shift + domain_reorientation + modular_architecture + domain_swapping + binding_partner + interdomain_coupling + release_or_activation_context + interface_operator + dual_basin_switch_operator + closure_operator + frustration_operator -> single-domain closure shortcut to domain-boundary, hinge, lock, and allosteric-basin architecture -> hinge, interface, or interdomain-lock perturbation shifts domain orientation and allosteric basin occupancy
transition_rules.null_control: generic domain text or copy-count metadata cannot validate an allosteric architecture without explicit domain-boundary/hinge/swap context
transition_rules.state_change: single-domain closure shortcut to domain-boundary, hinge, lock, and allosteric-basin architecture
transition_rules.testable_effect: hinge, interface, or interdomain-lock perturbation shifts domain orientation and allosteric basin occupancy

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows purely local defect with no interface/proteostasis dependence
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: membrane_segment + domain_boundary + mutation_site + interface + membrane + proteostasis_quality_control + interdomain_coupling + membrane_pressure_operator + closure_operator + proteostasis_operator + interface_operator -> domain-local destabilization to interface/proteostasis routing defect -> NBD1-only correction is partial; interface/proteostasis correction strengthens rescue
transition_rules.state_change: domain-local destabilization to interface/proteostasis routing defect
transition_rules.testable_effect: NBD1-only correction is partial; interface/proteostasis correction strengthens rescue

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout supports only one state under all contexts
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: state_basin + partner_context + secondary_structure_conflict + release_or_activation_context + binding_partner + dual_basin_switch_operator + interface_operator + frustration_operator -> one context-favored basin to competing alpha/beta state distribution -> context or partner perturbations shift basin occupancy
transition_rules.null_control: single averaged consensus fold is rejected
transition_rules.state_change: one context-favored basin to competing alpha/beta state distribution
transition_rules.testable_effect: context or partner perturbations shift basin occupancy

transition_rules.falsification_rule: wrong-region perturbations dominate while predicted interface is inert
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: short_linear_motif + c_terminal_interface + host_binding_surface + host_binding_partner + localization_context + host_hijack_operator + interface_operator + disorder_operator -> short exposed motif to host-interface capture without global fold requirement -> C-terminal/interface perturbations weaken host hijacking consequences
transition_rules.null_control: generic viral accessory annotation cannot validate the packet
transition_rules.state_change: short exposed motif to host-interface capture without global fold requirement
transition_rules.testable_effect: C-terminal/interface perturbations weaken host hijacking consequences

transition_rules.falsification_rule: free-state holdout shows stable standalone fold
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: disorder_tendency + partner_motif + amphipathic_segment + binding_partner + disorder_operator + interface_operator + closure_operator -> free disorder to partner-conditioned local ordering -> partner removal restores disorder and weakens interface readiness
transition_rules.null_control: bound-state order cannot be promoted to free-state solved fold
transition_rules.state_change: free disorder to partner-conditioned local ordering
transition_rules.testable_effect: partner removal restores disorder and weakens interface readiness

transition_rules.grammar_sentence: cofactor_motif + polar_cluster + burial_defect + ligand_or_cofactor + closure_operator + interface_operator -> weak apo basin to ligand-stabilized basin -> cofactor removal destabilizes the predicted basin
transition_rules.null_control: generic ligand annotation alone cannot define full grammar
transition_rules.state_change: weak apo basin to ligand-stabilized basin
transition_rules.testable_effect: cofactor removal destabilizes the predicted basin

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows ligand-independent folding or no geometry-locked basin effect
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: metal_cluster_geometry + coordination_shell_integrity + ligand_locked_basin + ligand_or_cofactor + redox_or_coordination_context + interface_operator + closure_operator + frustration_operator -> generic cofactor basin to metal/ligand-locked basin with apo-holo separation -> metal/cofactor removal or coordination-shell disruption unlocks the basin and increases frustration
transition_rules.null_control: generic cofactor annotation without metal, heme, nucleotide, or ligand-lock evidence remains generic cofactor
transition_rules.state_change: generic cofactor basin to metal/ligand-locked basin with apo-holo separation
transition_rules.testable_effect: metal/cofactor removal or coordination-shell disruption unlocks the basin and increases frustration

transition_rules.falsification_rule: matched controls beat the real target, or metal/TM/beta/repeat grammar explains the evidence better
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: secretory_redox_context + disulfide_pairing_topology + cysteine_pairing_constraint + extracellular_stabilized_fold + glycosylation_context + signal_peptide_removed_context + secretory_redox_environment + extracellular_quality_control + glycosylation_context + disulfide_pairing_operator + secretory_redox_operator + frustration_operator + proteostasis_operator + closure_operator -> generic cysteine-rich or secretory text to paired disulfide/redox topology with extracellular stabilization -> cysteine-pairing or redox perturbation weakens disulfide topology and raises mispaired frustration
transition_rules.null_control: signal peptide text, odd cysteine noise, true TM topology, or Cys-His metal coordination cannot validate disulfide grammar
transition_rules.state_change: generic cysteine-rich or secretory text to paired disulfide/redox topology with extracellular stabilization
transition_rules.testable_effect: cysteine-pairing or redox perturbation weakens disulfide topology and raises mispaired frustration

transition_rules.falsification_rule: matched controls beat the real signal, true-TM insertion dominates, or wrong grammar explains the boundary better
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: signal_peptide_routing_context + cleavage_site_context + n_terminal_secretory_hydrophobic_patch + true_transmembrane_span_context + secretory_lumenal_routing + membrane_insertion_routing + signal_anchor_ambiguity + secretory_translocon + membrane_insertion + cleavage_context + signal_peptide_routing_operator + tm_insertion_operator + cleavage_context_operator + secretory_routing_operator + membrane_pressure_operator + frustration_operator -> generic N-terminal hydrophobic signal to cleavable secretory route while separating true TM and signal-anchor ambiguity -> N-terminal masking or cleavage-context masking weakens secretory routing more than true-TM decoys
transition_rules.null_control: multi-pass TM, signal-anchor ambiguity, secretory disulfide, coiled/repeat/knotted candidates, and membrane sentinels cannot validate signal-peptide grammar
transition_rules.state_change: generic N-terminal hydrophobic signal to cleavable secretory route while separating true TM and signal-anchor ambiguity
transition_rules.testable_effect: N-terminal masking or cleavage-context masking weakens secretory routing more than true-TM decoys

transition_rules.falsification_rule: assembly/globular grammar preserves the evidence better, matched heptad controls beat the real target, or register perturbation is inert
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: heptad_register_context + hydrophobic_repeat_phase + parallel_antiparallel_register + oligomeric_coiled_coil_core + register_shift_frustration + coiled_coil_assembly_dependency + leucine_zipper_context + register_alignment + oligomeric_interface + hydrophobic_repeat_phase + heptad_register_operator + coiled_coil_interface_operator + oligomeric_register_operator + register_shift_frustration_operator + closure_operator -> generic helix, assembly, or globular closure to explicit heptad/register-controlled coiled-coil topology -> heptad shuffle or hydrophobic phase shift damages register state more than matched enemy grammars
transition_rules.null_control: generic oligomer, ordinary helix bundle, or globular hydrophobic core cannot validate coiled-coil register
transition_rules.state_change: generic helix, assembly, or globular closure to explicit heptad/register-controlled coiled-coil topology
transition_rules.testable_effect: heptad shuffle or hydrophobic phase shift damages register state more than matched enemy grammars

transition_rules.falsification_rule: beta/multidomain/globular grammar explains the target better, repeat controls beat the real target, or repeat perturbation is inert
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: repeat_unit_context + solenoid_axis_context + curved_repeat_stack + local_repeat_closure + global_repeat_topology + repeat_phase_alignment + repeat_boundary_frustration + ankyrin_armadillo_tpr_lrr_context + repeat_phase + solenoid_axis + local_to_global_repeat_stack + repeat_phase_operator + solenoid_axis_operator + local_repeat_closure_operator + global_repeat_stack_operator + repeat_boundary_frustration_operator -> generic beta/multidomain/globular readout to repeat-unit phase and solenoid-axis topology -> repeat-order shuffle or boundary masking damages phase-aligned solenoid state
transition_rules.null_control: long multidomain text, beta closure, or generic repeat words without phase/axis support cannot validate solenoid grammar
transition_rules.state_change: generic beta/multidomain/globular readout to repeat-unit phase and solenoid-axis topology
transition_rules.testable_effect: repeat-order shuffle or boundary masking damages phase-aligned solenoid state

transition_rules.falsification_rule: globular/beta/repeat grammar explains the target better, topology-masked controls beat the real target, or threading perturbation is inert
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: knot_core_context + threading_loop_context + slipknot_intermediate_context + topological_closure_constraint + long_range_threading_dependency + knotting_frustration + unknotted_decoy_dominance + threading + topological_closure + long_range_order + threading_operator + topological_closure_operator + long_range_threading_operator + slipknot_intermediate_operator + knotting_frustration_operator -> generic long-range closure to explicit knot/slipknot threading topology -> threading or long-range-order perturbation damages knot state while unknotted decoys fail
transition_rules.null_control: sequence alone cannot validate knotted topology; explicit non-coordinate topology context is required
transition_rules.state_change: generic long-range closure to explicit knot/slipknot threading topology
transition_rules.testable_effect: threading or long-range-order perturbation damages knot state while unknotted decoys fail

transition_rules.falsification_rule: holdout shows a complete monomeric fold, true membrane topology, or ligand-stabilized core without assembly dependence
transition_rules.grammar_sentence: assembly_required_core + partner_completed_core + interface_buried_hydrophobicity + monomer_incomplete_topology + binding_partner + partner_copy + concentration + interface_operator + closure_operator + frustration_operator -> monomer-incomplete topology to partner-completed assembly basin -> partner/interface disruption exposes incomplete monomer topology and weakens the assembled basin
transition_rules.null_control: generic complex annotation alone cannot validate assembly-required folding
transition_rules.state_change: monomer-incomplete topology to partner-completed assembly basin
transition_rules.testable_effect: partner/interface disruption exposes incomplete monomer topology and weakens the assembled basin

transition_rules.grammar_sentence: repeat_interface + oligomer_motif + burial_surface + concentration + partner_copy + interface_operator + closure_operator -> monomeric partial order to oligomer-stabilized interface basin -> interface or concentration perturbation shifts folding/assembly
transition_rules.state_change: monomeric partial order to oligomer-stabilized interface basin
transition_rules.testable_effect: interface or concentration perturbation shifts folding/assembly
